Name: Automatic Flat Boxes
Short description: (8FFBA, 10FFBA, 12FFBA, 14FFBA & 8FBBA, 10FBBA, 12FBBA) Columbia offers the widest range of high quality Finishing Boxes in the world. The Automatic Flat Boxes reduce the need to push the compound on…
Description:
(8FFBA, 10FFBA, 12FFBA, 14FFBA & 8FBBA, 10FBBA, 12FBBA)

Columbia offers the widest range of high quality Finishing Boxes in the world. The Automatic Flat Boxes reduce the need to push the compound on to the wall. By engaging, the box springs put pressure on the compound chamber requiring only a light push to operate the box. Well-built and fine-tuned to offer great flat joints for years. We have been told for years that our boxes are the smoothest finishing and easiest to push. We are very proud to get this feedback and will make sure that every Finishing Box we make exceeds your expectations.

Note: Columbia Automatic Boxes do not fit in Road Case.

FEATURES:

  • Available in 8″, 10″, 12″ & 14″ regular and 8″, 10″ & 12″ Fat Boy sizes
  • Engaging axel creates pressure on mud release
  • Over 50% easier to push
  • Great for vertical flats
  • Bead wheel protects axel from wear while running box on bead
  • Hand made from U.S. billet aluminum and steel components
  • Machined in our state of the art facility in Canada

Name: Columbia X Graco PowerFill 3.5 Loading Pump
Short description: There are currently no resources for this product....
Description:
Note: This product is not eligible for rebates, wholesale pricing, or discounts and is only available in North America.

Columbia Tools has partnered with Graco to bring you a Columbia Tools branded version of their already successful cordless powered loading pump for Columbia customers. The Columbia X Graco PowerFill is designed to fill all automatic taping and finishing tools with ease. The PowerFill system completely eliminates the need for manual pumping, allowing you to fill with just the push of a button.

Say Goodbye to Hand Pumping. The single-button pumping mechanism reduces fatigue and minimizes the risk of injury associated with manual pumps. With a flow rate of up to 3.5 gpm, you can fill tools lightning-fast, and with the capability to pump up to 55 gallons on a single battery charge, you’ll have all-day performance. Plus, it’s programmable to automatically refill tools with Precision Fill.

Bucket not included.

Features

  • SmartControl Pro with Programmable Precision Fill: Automatically refills your tools to your preset level.
  • One Button Pumping: Eliminates fatigue and potential injuries.
  • Hands-Free Continuous Run Mode: Ideal for transferring large quantities of material or self-cleaning.
  • Hi-Rise Fill Tube: Allows you to fill tools while standing upright, protecting your back and reducing fatigue. The tube rotates to position the outlet where needed, including above buckets to save space and contain drips.
  • Includes Filler Attachments: Designed for angle and flat boxes.

Powerstroke Pump

  • 4X Life vs. Manual Pumps: Built for exceptional durability.
  • Fastest Tool Fills: Pumps up to 3.5 gpm for efficient filling.
  • Maintenance Free: Tool-less access for easy cleaning of the pump cylinder, inlet, and filter.

ProConnect Pump and Removable Powerhead

  • No-Tools Pump and Powerhead Removal: Easily detach the powerhead for storage and quick cleaning.

Powered by DEWALT®

  • Compatible with any 20V MAX Lithium-Ion DEWALT Battery: Pumps up to 55 gallons per charge for reliable all-day use.

Adjustable Bucket Stabilizer

  • No-Tools Adjustment: Fits most buckets and containers.
  • Oversized Foot Bracket and Stabilizer Arm: Keeps the pump secure and stable.
  • Convertible Outlet: Change from right to left-sided pump outlet in minutes

Specifications

  • Version: 26B418
  • Max GPM (lpm): 3.5 (13.2)
  • Weight Lbs (Kg): 17 (7.7)
  • Pump: PowerStroke
  • Power/Battery: (1) DEWALT 20V MAX* COMPACT 2.0 ah Lithium-Ion Batteries and (1) Charger
  • Pump Outlet: Hi-Rise Fill Tube w/Box Filler
  • Precision Fill: Yes
  • Inlet Filter: Tool-less, 10 Mesh (1)
  • Adjustable Flow: Yes
  • Fits Container: Adjustable up to 5 (7-15″ Bucket Height Range)

  • 5 designs: 2.5″, 3″, 3.5″, 4″ and wide track

Description:
Columbia offers the widest range of high quality, high capacity finishing boxes in the world. From our 5.5″ Fat Boy to our 12″, they are all star performers. Well-built and fine-tuned to offer great flat joints for years. We have been told for years that our boxes are the smoothest finishing and easiest to push, and now they’re also the highest capacity on the market. We are very proud to get this feedback and will make sure that every Fat Boy box we make exceeds your expectations.

FEATURES:

  • Available in 5.5″, 8″, 10″, 12″ sizes
  • Bead wheel protects axel from wear while running box on bead
  • Hand made from U.S. billet aluminum and steel components
  • Machined in our state of the art facility in Canada

Description:
Fat Boy Smoothing Blades

Available Now

Columbia is proud to launch the Fat Boy Smoothing Blades—built for comfort, precision, and performance.

With a lightweight, rubberized ergonomic grip to reduce slipping, the Fat Boy delivers smooth, even finishes with control. Its replaceable stainless steel blade offers long-term durability, while the new Fat Boy Smoothing Blade Claw expands your finishing options.

Two new Fiberglass Telescopic Extension Poles debut alongside the blades. Their snap lock system connects seamlessly with the Fat Boy Adapter and also works with our 2K Handle Mud Rollers, giving unmatched versatility.

When used by Hand or handles—the Fat Boy brings efficiency and comfort to every pass.

Key Features:

  • Replaceable  Stainless Blade: Long-lasting and ultra-durable.

    Lightweight & Ergonomic Grip: Designed for comfort, control, and less fatigue.

    Rounded Anti-Trace Edges: Minimize lines and imperfections.

    New Fiberglass Telescopic Poles with Snap Lock: Extend your reach and work seamlessly with Fat Boy Blades and 2K Handle Mud Rollers.

    Available Sizes & Part #:

    Fat Boy Smoothing Blades

    Fat Boy Smoothing Blade 7” – FSB7

    Fat Boy Smoothing Blade 10” – FSB10

Short description: Order now to be ready for the Launch on December 15, 2024! Introducing the Columbia Mud Pan—the first in our new line of premium hand tools, designed for professionals who demand durability, comfort,…
Description:
Order now to be ready for the Launch on December 15, 2024!

Introducing the Columbia Mud Pan—the first in our new line of premium hand tools, designed for professionals who demand durability, comfort, and performance. Crafted from heavy-gauge stainless steel, this mud pan is built to withstand the toughest tasks, while its watertight, laser-welded seams ensure long-lasting reliability. With tapered ends and sides for a secure grip, this tool is ready to handle any job with ease. Plus, every Columbia Mud Pan comes with a free soft, non-slip rubber grip for enhanced comfort and ease of use.

Now available in three convenient sizes—12″, 14″, and 16″—there’s a Columbia Mud Pan perfect for any project. The mud pans are sold in packs of 6 to dealers, but you have the flexibility to sell them individually to your customers.

Lifetime Warranty:

We stand by the quality and craftsmanship of our products. Each Columbia Mud Pan is backed by a lifetime warranty, ensuring you can rely on it for years of hard work.

Key Features:

  • Heavy-Gauge Stainless Steel: Engineered for strength and longevity, this mud pan resists wear and tear for reliable, long-term use.
  • Watertight Laser-Welded Seams: Prevents leaks, even under heavy-duty conditions, for consistent performance.
  • Comfortable Grip: Tapered ends and sides provide a secure, ergonomic hold for better control and comfort.
  • Straight Edges: Ideal for wiping joint knives clean, ensuring a mess-free and efficient work process.
  • Complimentary Rubber Grip: Every Columbia Mud Pan comes with a FREE soft, non-slip rubber grip for enhanced comfort and ease of use—adding even more value to this already premium tool.
  • Available in 12″, 14″, and 16″ Sizes: Choose the right size for your specific needs and project requirements.

The Columbia Mud Pan—designed for pros, built to last. Available for order now.

The Predator is the world’s first Carbon Fiber Taper and the benefits that come with this are endless. This tool will tape flats and angles effortlessly year after year. From less drag in the corners to our easy to remove cap for cleaning, this tool will not let you down. The Predator maintains it’s stable temperature and remains warm to the touch. Every taper comes standard with an adjustable brake and quick release for tape changing. The Titanium pull rod is just another detail that adds style and edge to this innovative, unique taper. If you are serious about taping and care how a taper feels and performs this is the one for you.

  • NEW Very smooth Patent Pending Pump Action cutting system with a roller chain

Name: Columbia Sawed Off Mini PREDATOR Automatic Taper
Short description: Columbia Taping Tools introduces the world's first Mini Carbon Fiber Taper, The Predator "Sawed Off" Mini. Unlike other taper bodies made mostly fr...
Description: Columbia Taping Tools introduces the world's first Mini Carbon Fiber Taper, The Predator "Sawed Off" Mini. Unlike other taper bodies made mostly from aluminum, the Predator's Carbon Fiber construction, makes this precision-engineered tool 20% lighter and more durable then any standard mini taper on the market. Another unique benefit of this Dent Proof construction, is that Carbon Fiber maintains temperature stability, meaning this taper will remain warm to the touch. The 6 wheel cutting sleeve has been updated in favor of teflon sliders which gives the operator a smoother glide and better grip. Now, changing the sliders out is simple field maintenance and can be installed with a standard screwdriver in minutes as opposed to half an hour or more. The pull ring is ideal for higher ceilings. The Predator will tape flats and angles effortlessly with less drag in the corners. The quick release cap makes cleaning a breeze and the stainless steel side plates, cable drum, and creaser arms offer a lifetime of corrosion resistance. With style, functionality, and durability the Predator from Columbia takes the -Evolution of Taping- to a whole new level. Predator "Sawed Off" Mini is perfect for taping drywall in small rooms and closets when a full size taper is too cumbersome.

Name: Sabre Smoothing Blades
Short description: Columbia has answered the call from our customers looking for a lighter/more affordable version of the Tomahawk Smoothing Blades. The Sabre Smoothing Blades still offer a precise finish but by no…
Description:
Columbia has answered the call from our customers looking for a lighter/more affordable version of the Tomahawk Smoothing Blades. The Sabre Smoothing Blades still offer a precise finish but by no means does this product replace the Tomahawk’s being our premium option. It is our solution to Columbia Customers looking for a lighter/more affordable option. The body profile remains the same as the Tomahawk’s but is made from high quality plastic rather than billet aluminium.

One of the standout features of the Sabre Smoothing Blades is their remarkable weight—around 60% lighter than the Tomahawk Smoothing Blades—making them easier to maneuvre and control. Additionally, they offer a competitive price point costing around 40% less allowing you to choose the right tool for your needs without compromise.

Whether you prefer manual use or want to enhance your reach with a Sabre Extension pole (using the Sabre Claw adapter), the Sabre Smoothing Blades deliver perfectly even usage and smoothness across the entire length of the blade. Their ergonomic and lightweight design ensures that you can work efficiently without fatigue.

FEATURES:

  • 10 sizes: 7″, 10″, 12″, 14″, 16″, 18″, 24″, 32″, 40″ & 48″
  • Works with by hand or with the Sabre Claw Adapter (SBC) adaptor for the Sabre Pole (SBP)
  • Hardened Stainless Steel Blade: Durable and ultra-abrasion resistant for long-lasting performance.
  • Rounded Anti-Trace Edges: Designed to minimise marks and imperfections.
  • High-Performance Bi-Flex Technology: Featuring a PVC plate for enhanced flexibility and control.

Description: EasyClean® Automatic Taper Introduction The EasyClean® Automatic Taper from TapeTech is designed to streamline the drywall finishing process. This innovative tool ensures a perfect application of joint tape and compound in one seamless motion, making it ideal for professional use. Features and Benefits Lightweight and Durable The EasyClean® Automatic Taper is constructed with high-quality materials that provide durability and longevity. Despite its robust construction, it remains lightweight, reducing user fatigue during prolonged use. This ensures consistent, high-quality results on every project. Efficient Design Equipped with TapeTech’s EasyClean® cover plate, this taper simplifies maintenance, saving valuable time. The adjustable brake system allows for precise control of the compound flow, enhancing the overall finishing quality. Additionally, its smooth operation is unmatched in the industry. Versatile Applications Perfect for applying joint tape and compound to both flat joints on walls and ceilings as well as internal corners, the EasyClean® Automatic Taper is a versatile tool suitable for various drywall finishing tasks. This versatility makes it an essential tool for any professional drywall finisher. Name: EasyClean® Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper
Short description: EasyClean® Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper The EasyClean® Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper is the world’s lightest automatic taper. Weighing only 5.65 pounds
Description: EasyClean® Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper The EasyClean® Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper is the world’s lightest automatic taper. Weighing only 5.65 pounds, the 07TT-C is up to 20% lighter than other tapers on the market. This significant weight reduction helps to decrease worker fatigue, making it easier to handle and use for extended periods. Innovative Carbon Fiber Design The EasyClean® Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper is constructed from carbon fiber, which makes both the main tube and the control tube incredibly durable. Carbon fiber is a material that won’t dent and remains temperature-neutral. This means no more dealing with cold tubes in winter or hot tubes in summer, providing consistent performance year-round. Advanced Features for Efficiency The 07TT-C comes with TapeTech’s EasyClean® cover plate and tube protector design. This feature simplifies the cleaning process, saving you time and effort. Additionally, the taper includes an adjustable brake, allowing you to control the flow of the joint compound easily. The EasyClean® Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper is known for having the smoothest action in the industry, ensuring a seamless application every time. Versatile Application The EasyClean® Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper is designed to apply joint tape and compound simultaneously. It works on both flat joints on walls and ceilings as well as internal corners. This versatility makes it an essential tool for any drywall finishing job, big or small. Benefits of the EasyClean® Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper - Lightweight: At 5.65 pounds, it reduces worker fatigue. - Durable: Made from carbon fiber, it won’t dent and is temperature-neutral. - Easy to Clean: Features TapeTech’s EasyClean® cover plate and tube protector design. - Adjustable Brake: Allows for easy control of joint compound flow. - Smooth Action: Known for the smoothest action in the industry. - Versatile: Applies joint tape and compound to both flat joints and internal corners. Improve Your Work Quality Using the EasyClean® Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper helps improve the quality and efficiency of your drywall finishing work. Its lightweight design and smooth operation allow for precise application, reducing the need for touch-ups and rework. This tool is ideal for professionals who demand the best in performance and reliability. Short description: The TapeTech Corner Roller quickly and accurately embeds the tape firmly into the internal corners of the drywall. Use the corner roller immediately a
Description: The TapeTech Corner Roller quickly and accurately embeds the tape firmly into the internal corners of the drywall. Use the corner roller immediately after applying joint tape to the internal corner with the automatic taper. The corner roller forces excess joint compound out from behind the tape in preparation for the corner finisher. The TapeTech Corner Roller features stainless steel rollers for crisp edges and long life. Use with the FHTT Fiberglass Handle or the XHTT Extension Handle – not included. Description: The continuous flow tank filter fits into the bottom of the 95 liter filler tank of the CTPMP continuous flow pump. It prevents foreign bodies from getting into the pump so that the excess filler compound can be reused from the peeling phase of the drywall finishing. Short description: TapeTech Corner Finisher The TapeTech Corner Finisher is designed to perfectly feather both joint compound edges of internal corners in one pass. It c
Description: TapeTech Corner Finisher The TapeTech Corner Finisher is designed to perfectly feather both joint compound edges of internal corners in one pass. It can be used for wall-to-wall internal corners or wall-to-ceiling corners. This tool, also known as an Angle Finisher, attaches to a corner applicator (CA07TT or CA08TT) or the 14TT MudRunner®. It helps you quickly and professionally finish internal drywall corners. Perfect for Internal Corners The TapeTech Corner Finisher is ideal for wiping down excess mud in internal corners. It embeds inside corner tape on walls and ceilings, making the finishing process smooth and efficient. Whether you are working on small residential projects or large commercial sites, this tool ensures a high-quality finish every time. Versatility and Ease of Use Corner Finishers are versatile and can be used in various applications. They are perfect for both wall-to-wall and wall-to-ceiling corners. These tools are spring-loaded to help compensate for slightly imperfect corners. This feature ensures that you get a consistent finish even on uneven surfaces. Compatible with Handles The TapeTech Corner Finisher works with the FHTT Fiberglass Handle and the XHTT Extension Handle, though these handles are sold separately. These handles provide extra reach and control, making it easier to work on high or hard-to-reach corners. The ergonomic design of these handles reduces fatigue and increases productivity, allowing you to work more efficiently. Durable and Reliable Crafted from high-quality materials, the TapeTech Corner Finisher is built to last. It can withstand rigorous use on construction sites, ensuring long-term reliability. This durability makes it a valuable addition to any drywall professional's toolkit. Improve Your Work Quality Using the TapeTech Corner Finisher helps improve the quality of your drywall finishing. It provides a smooth, professional-grade finish that will impress your clients. By making the finishing process more efficient, it also saves you time and effort. This tool is essential for anyone looking to achieve top-notch results in drywall finishing. Explore More To explore our range of TapeTech products and learn more about how the Corner Finisher can enhance your drywall finishing experience, contact your local distributor or visit an authorized TapeTech dealer. Specifications: - Usage: Internal corners, both wall-to-wall and wall-to-ceiling - Compatibility: Works with CA07TT, CA08TT corner applicators, and 14TT MudRunner® - Handles: Compatible with FHTT Fiberglass Handle and XHTT Extension Handle (sold separately) Experience the Difference Incorporate the TapeTech Corner Finisher into your workflow to see the difference in performance and ease of use. Ideal for professionals seeking precision and reliability, this tool represents TapeTech’s commitment to innovation and excellence in drywall finishing tools. Elevate your drywall finishing capabilities with TapeTech — where quality meets innovation.

Description: The TapeTech EasyRoll® Adjustable Corner Finisher is used to perfectly feather both joint compound edges of internal corners in one pass. The Corner Finishers can be used for wall-to-wall internal corners or wall-to-ceiling corners. The “adjustable” feature of this tool refers to the ability to control the amount of spring pressure by engaging or disengaging one set of tension springs on the back of the corner finisher. Corner Finishers, also referred to as Angle Finishers or Angle Heads, are attached to a corner applicator (CA07TT or CA08TT) or the 14TT MudRunner® to quickly and professionally finish internal drywall corners. Name: 3-1/2" EasyRoll® Adjustable Corner Finisher
Short description: The TapeTech EasyRoll® Adjustable Corner Finisher is used to perfectly feather both joint compound edges of internal corners in one pass. The Corner F
Description: The TapeTech EasyRoll® Adjustable Corner Finisher is used to perfectly feather both joint compound edges of internal corners in one pass. The Corner Finishers can be used for wall-to-wall internal corners or wall-to-ceiling corners. The “adjustable” feature of this tool refers to the ability to control the amount of spring pressure by engaging or disengaging one set of tension springs on the back of the corner finisher. Corner Finishers, also referred to as Angle Finishers or Angle Heads, are attached to a corner applicator (CA07TT or CA08TT) or the 14TT MudRunner® to quickly and professionally finish internal drywall corners. EasyRoll® Adjustable Corner Finishers have wheels to provide the smoothest action on the wall and are spring loaded to help compensate for slightly imperfect corners. Name: EasyClean® Loading Pump
Short description: The TapeTech 76TT EasyClean® Loading Pump combines reliability with innovation. The 76TT features the slim tube design preferred by professional finis
Description: The TapeTech 76TT EasyClean® Loading Pump combines reliability with innovation. The 76TT features the slim tube design preferred by professional finishers and robust construction for dependable performance and long life. The TapeTech 76TT Loading Pump has a redesigned head and a new Twist-lock foot valve that provides secure attachment and easy removal for cleaning and maintenance. And the 76TT does not require a paper gasket for the filler adapter or gooseneck due to an innovative, integrated O-Ring that provides a terrific seal with fewer headaches from lost, worn or damaged paper gaskets. The 76TT pump accepts the standard 85T gooseneck and 90T filler adapter. Fills Automatic Tapers (with 85T gooseneck) Fills finishing boxes, MudRunner®, corner applicators and nail spotters (with 90T filler adapter)
Categories: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Automatic Tapers

Name: EasyClean® Loading Pump for Canada
Short description: The 76TT-CA EasyClean® Loading Pump is specifically designed to work with standard joint compound buckets in Canada, which are slightly taller than st
Description: The 76TT-CA EasyClean® Loading Pump is specifically designed to work with standard joint compound buckets in Canada, which are slightly taller than standard U.S. buckets. The additional length provides stability and allows the foot valve to reach the bottom of the bucket, maximizing joint compound usage. The 76TT-CA pump has all the same unique features of the 76TT, including the tool-less foot valve, integrated outlet gasket and EasyClean® design.
Categories: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Automatic Tapers

They help you control the finishing boxes for a perfect finish. Innovation in Drywall Tools TapeTech is known for making excellent drywall tools. The Finishing Box Handles are no exception. These handles integrate seamlessly with TapeTech’s finishing box systems. This makes them easy to use and ensures precise control. For professionals in the drywall industry, these handles are essential for achieving smooth, professional-grade results. Ergonomic Design The TapeTech Finishing Box Handles are designed for both comfort and functionality. They are made from strong materials to withstand tough use on construction sites. This durability means they are reliable and will last a long time. The ergonomic design of these handles makes it easier to move and control your TapeTech finishing boxes. As a result, this reduces fatigue and boosts productivity, allowing you to work more efficiently. Versatility and Efficiency These handles are perfect for a wide range of projects, from small repair jobs to large-scale projects. They make the finishing process smoother and reduce the need for touch-ups. This efficiency saves time and improves the quality of your work, ensuring clients are happy with every finish. By streamlining the finishing process, TapeTech Finishing Box Handles help you deliver consistent, high-quality results. Experience the Difference Adding TapeTech Finishing Box Handles to your toolkit can make a significant difference in performance and ease of use. They are ideal for professionals who need precision and reliability in their work. These handles demonstrate TapeTech’s commitment to producing top-notch drywall finishing tools. With TapeTech Finishing Box Handles, you can elevate your drywall finishing capabilities and achieve a higher level of craftsmanship. Explore More To explore our range of TapeTech products and learn more about how the Finishing Box Handles can transform your drywall finishing experience, contact your local distributor or visit an authorized TapeTech dealer. Name: 4" Compound Roller Frame

Description: TapeTech 4" Roller Cage CCAGE04 TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for applying large amounts of drywall compound on walls and ceilings for finishing large patches and butt joints, or skimming entire walls, ceilings and rooms. They are a great alternative to breaking out a sprayer or trying to apply the compound with knives or trowels. Simply apply the joint compound with the TapeTech premium drywall joint compound roller and then skim the area with a TapeTech premium finishing knife for an amazing finish. TapeTech compound rollers are designed for use with TapeTech roller frames. The shafts of our dedicated roller frames are a full 5/16” thick, providing the strongest frame in the industry – a must for this heavy-duty application. The roller and roller frames quickly and easily attach to our TapeTech model CROLLHAN2 extendable support handle (44” – 79”) to make quick work of most walls and ceilings without the need for stilts or scaffolds. Key Features: Robust Design: Features a full 5/16” thick frame design – stronger than smaller ¼” thick frames – and the most robust joint compound roller frame on the market. Comfortable Handle: The TapeTech Roller frames feature a comfortable, two-component over molded handle that provides comfortable handling and positive grip, even when wet. Highest Quality: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are manufactured in Europe exclusively for TapeTech, using the highest quality reticulated polypropylene nap for great results and long life. Highest Capacity: When matched with a TapeTech premium drywall joint compound roller, applies nearly 50% more compound to the surface between fills compared to other high nap rollers and frames. Highest Coverage: The unique design and manufacturing of TapeTech premium joint compound rollers releases more compound from the nap and onto the surface, providing the highest coverage rate per roller load. Extended Reach: Easily attaches to TapeTech CROLLHAN2 extendable handle to reach most common walls and ceilings without stilts or scaffolds. With super secure attachment and lightweight but robust construction, you’ll quickly knock out any wall coverage or skimming job. Ideal for Skimming: The TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for quickly applying large amounts of compound over patches, butt joints or entire surfaces. The perfect set up for skimming with TapeTech premium finishing knives. Available in 4 sizes: TapeTech premium joint compound roller frames are available in 4-inch, 9-inch and 12-inch sizes plus an integrated 2-inch model that includes the roller and frame together.

Description: TapeTech 12" EasyClean® Finishing Box: Professional Results with Precision and Speed The TapeTech 12" EasyClean® Finishing Box is designed to automatically dispense the proper amount of joint compound while feathering the edges of butt joints and flat joints in one pass. This advanced finishing box helps produce professional results every time, ensuring a flawless finish for both walls and ceilings. Key Features - Adjustable Crown Control: The adjustable crown setting dial allows users to easily adjust the amount of joint compound applied over the tape on the drywall joint. This is particularly helpful when progressing from the first finishing application to the second or third. - Pivoting Axle: The pivoting axle compensates for variations in drywall or sheetrock height on either side of the joint, ensuring a smooth, even finish. - EasyRoll™ Wheel System: The EasyRoll™ wheel system allows you to expertly finish all types of outside corner bead up to two times faster than finishing by hand. These wheels work with all types of corner bead including metal, paper-faced, vinyl, and bullnose. Benefits - Efficient Application: The EasyClean® Finishing Box applies the first coat of joint compound to embed tape at butt joints and flat joints on walls and ceilings. It finishes these joints by feathering the edges, ensuring a smooth and professional look. - Durable Construction: The box is made of anodized aluminum, featuring a solid brass blade holder and a hardened steel blade, which ensures long-lasting durability and performance. Usage and Compatibility The TapeTech 12" EasyClean® Finishing Box is a versatile tool that can be used with various tape tech boxes, including the tapetech 10 box and tapetech 10 flat box. It is ideal for finishing drywall joints and can be used with the tapetech box handle and tapetech box handle parts for enhanced control and ease of use. Professionals will find this drywall box indispensable for achieving consistent, high-quality finishes. The EasyRoll™ wheels make it easy to guide the finishing box along the corner bead without aftermarket attachments, ensuring a precise and damage-free application. Name: MAXXBOX®
Short description: Introducing the first high capacity finishing boxes designed to hold the right amount of joint compound when you really need it – on the first or seco
Description: Introducing the first high capacity finishing boxes designed to hold the right amount of joint compound when you really need it – on the first or second coat when you’re filling the joint – without the unnecessary weight you don’t need on the finish coat. The TapeTech MAXXBOX® Finishing Boxes are designed with the optimum capacity to weight ratio. This means that you get more “usable” joint compound – the amount that you can actually get out of the finishing box and onto the wall – when you actually need it, like on the first coat. The TapeTech 7” MAXXBOX® finishing box delivers 94% more usable joint compound than the standard EasyClean® finishing box (model EZ07TT) and up to 68% more usable capacity than competitive high capacity finishing boxes. Step up to the boxes designed to hold and deliver the right amount. Every time. Every box. MAXXBOX®. Applies first coat of joint compound to embed tape at butt joints and flat joints on walls and ceilings Finishes butt joints and flat joints on walls and ceilings Feathers edges of butt joints and flat joints
Categories: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Finishing Boxes

Description: The new MudRunner® Pro Extension allows the user to add 12" length to the MR01TT to reach higher spaces. The MRX01TT simply attaches by inserting the extrusion piece into the receiving port on the MR01TT and securing the clamps. The MRX01TT also has a receiving port to add multiple extensions. Name: MWS Accessory Kit
Short description: TapeTech has now included a new Accessory Kit with every Wash Station purchased. The kit includes: a. Hanging Basket – to keep your already cleaned to
Description: TapeTech has now included a new Accessory Kit with every Wash Station purchased. The kit includes: a. Hanging Basket – to keep your already cleaned tools clean and allows them to hang to dry. Features: Hanging Basket – Allows your already clean tools to stay clean and not be put back into the basin with other tools. The basket allows for the tools to begin drying while hanging. The basket can be hung at various locations on the wash basin. Nozzle Brush – The brush simply snaps onto the end of the spray nozzle. When used in combination with the spray nozzle, the new brush helps remove stubborn compound faster. The brush also acts as a splash shield against over spray. Drain Riser – The drain riser is inserted into the metal drain in the basin and helps to prevent compound from draining into the bucket, keeping your water cleaner longer. By removing the riser, the retained compound can now be drained into a disposal bucket.
Categories: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Cleaning & Maintenance

There is also a directional feature of where to spray. Hose – A more robust hose has been added to the kit and will now be the standard option packed in the box. Upgraded Brass Connectors – New and improved connectors have been added to the hose for attachment to the MWS01-TT Mobile Wash Station.

Name: Mobile Wash Station
Short description: The TapeTech MWS01-TT Mobile Wash Station is the lightest and most portable wash station available. It is the perfect solution for cleaning tools and
Description: The TapeTech MWS01-TT Mobile Wash Station is the lightest and most portable wash station available. It is the perfect solution for cleaning tools and equipment on the jobsite, especially when water supplies are limited. Working from just a 5-gallon bucket of water, the MWS01-TT generates the ideal water pressure to effectively clean drywall finishing tools, paint brushes, rollers, pans and more! The MWS01-TT also helps finishers and painters comply with environmental laws by providing a convenient, professional wash station that does not wash the joint compound or paint into the soil. The legs of the MWS01-TT open and close effortlessly for quick set up, break down and transport. The MWS01-TT weighs just 34 pounds. Features: Improved pump that only circulates while the trigger is being operated, extending the life of the pump and providing twice the cleaning power of the original pump Improved spray hose &amp; nozzle with more control over pressure and directional spray Now includes Accessory Kit (MWS-ACC) with basket, drain riser, and nozzle brush to dry your tools, keep compound out of your water bucket, and remove stubborn compound Locking Wheel Kit – MWS01-LW also included lets you easily move your Mobile Wash Station around and lock when needed
Categories: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Cleaning & Maintenance

Name: EasyClean® Nail Spotter
Short description: TapeTech EasyClean® Nail Spotter The TapeTech EasyClean® Nail Spotter is a must-have tool for drywall finishing. It fills the depressions left by nail
Description: TapeTech EasyClean® Nail Spotter The TapeTech EasyClean® Nail Spotter is a must-have tool for drywall finishing. It fills the depressions left by nail or screw heads during drywall installation. The Nail Spotter's easy clean box design helps fill these depressions and remove extra compound at the same time. This makes the drywall finishing process faster and easier. Key Features A key feature of the TapeTech EasyClean® Nail Spotter is its hardened steel skid plate. This plate lets the Nail Spotter move smoothly along the wall. It also protects the stainless steel blade from damage caused by nail or screw heads that are not fully set below the drywall surface. Consequently, this feature helps the tool last longer, making it a smart buy for drywall professionals. Handle Compatibility The Nail Spotter works with the XHTT Extension handle and the FHTT fiberglass handle. These handles are sold separately. They give extra reach and control, making it easier to work on high or hard-to-reach areas without ladders or scaffolding. The extension handle is great for big projects, while the fiberglass handle is a light yet strong option. User-Friendly Design The TapeTech EasyClean® Nail Spotter is designed to be easy to use. The easy clean box design makes cleaning simple and quick. This is very useful for busy contractors who need to keep their tools in good condition without losing time. Benefits: - Efficient Drywall Finishing: Fills depressions caused by nail or screw heads and removes extra joint compound in one pass. - Durable Construction: Hardened steel skid plate protects the blade, ensuring long-lasting performance. - Enhanced Reach and Control: Compatible with XHTT Extension and FHTT fiberglass handles, available separately. - User-Friendly Design: Easy clean box design makes maintenance simple. For more information on using the TapeTech EasyClean® Nail Spotter and other drywall finishing tools, visit our Drywall Tool Guide. To see how the Nail Spotter works in real-world settings, check out our demonstration video and customer testimonials on our YouTube channel. With these features, the TapeTech EasyClean® Nail Spotter helps you get a professional finish with less effort. Its durable build and easy-to-use design make it an essential tool for any drywall project. Specifications - Material: Stainless steel blade, hardened steel skid plate - Handles: Compatible with XHTT Extension handle and FHTT fiberglass handle (sold separately) - Weight: Lightweight for easy use and handling For buying options and to explore our full range of drywall finishing tools, visit our product catalog.
Categories: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Automatic Tapers

Name: QuickBox® QSX
Short description: The QuickBox® QSX from TapeTech is the first finishing box specifically designed to be used with fast-setting joint compounds. The 6 ½” QuickBox® QSX
Description: The QuickBox® QSX from TapeTech is the first finishing box specifically designed to be used with fast-setting joint compounds. The 6 ½” QuickBox® QSX is the perfect tool for contractors who use fast-setting joint compound for the first coat over the paper or fiberglass joint tape. Constructed from advanced space age materials, fast-setting joint compound is easily removed from the finishing box, even hours or days later. The compound literally falls out of the QuickBox® QSX with a few light taps. The glass-filled polypropylene shell provides a slick surface with maximum strength and durability. The optimized blade design matches the blade with the application, eliminating the need to make adjustments or change crown settings. And it takes just a few seconds to change the long-lasting blades. QuickBox® QSX works with all finishing box handles, including the Wizard®. Now you can combine the speed and consistency of finishing boxes with the speed of fast-setting joint compound!
Categories: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Finishing Boxes

Name: Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper
Short description: The Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper: Revolutionizing Drywall Finishing &nbsp; The Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper is an innovative tool designed to st
Description: The Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper: Revolutionizing Drywall Finishing &nbsp; The Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper is an innovative tool designed to streamline the drywall finishing process. When connected to the Continuous Flow Pump (CTPMP), this advanced taper simultaneously applies drywall tape and the correct amount of joint compound to all types of drywall joints. This combination of efficiency and precision makes it an indispensable tool for professional contractors. Key Features of the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper &nbsp; One of the standout features of the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper is its inline handle with dual trigger, which enhances control and ease of use. Weighing just 7 pounds, it is lightweight enough to be maneuvered effortlessly, reducing user fatigue during extended use. The taper's design includes a creaser wheel, which ensures a perfect finish every time by embedding the tape securely into the joint compound. &nbsp; Additionally, the tool-less hose connection makes setup and disassembly quick and straightforward, saving valuable time on the job. For added convenience, the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper can be paired with the CTVLV for wireless, radio frequency (RF) control, allowing the user to manage the flow of joint compound from the pump to the taper with ease. &nbsp; Versatile Application &nbsp; The Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper is versatile, capable of handling various types of drywall joints with precision: - Butt Joints and Flat Joints: Whether you're working on walls or ceilings, the taper applies the joint compound and tape seamlessly, ensuring a smooth and professional finish. - Internal Corners: The taper is designed to efficiently handle internal corners on walls and ceilings, making it a comprehensive solution for all your drywall finishing needs. Advantages of Using the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper &nbsp; - Increased Efficiency: By applying both tape and joint compound simultaneously, the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper significantly speeds up the drywall finishing process. This increased efficiency allows for more work to be completed in less time, enhancing productivity. - Consistent Quality: The precise application of joint compound and tape ensures a consistent, high-quality finish on every joint. This consistency reduces the need for additional touch-ups and sanding, saving both time and materials. - Ease of Use: The lightweight design and ergonomic inline handle make the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper easy to maneuver, even in tight spaces. The dual trigger system provides greater control over the application process, resulting in a more accurate and professional finish. - Quick Setup: The tool-less hose connection and wireless RF control simplify the setup and operation of the taper, allowing users to focus on the task at hand without worrying about complex equipment adjustments. &nbsp; Conclusion &nbsp; The Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper is an essential tool for anyone involved in drywall installation and finishing. Its advanced features, combined with its lightweight and ergonomic design, make it a valuable addition to any toolkit. Whether you are working on large-scale projects or smaller tasks, the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper will help you achieve a flawless finish with minimal effort. Embrace the future of drywall finishing with the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper and experience unparalleled efficiency and quality in your work.
Categories: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Continuous Flow System

Name: Extension Handle
Short description: TapeTech is the first company to introduce an interchangeable handle system that allows one support handle to be used with every tool. Whether you use
Description: TapeTech is the first company to introduce an interchangeable handle system that allows one support handle to be used with every tool. Whether you use standard, fixed length fiberglass handles or aluminum extension support handles, you’ll need just one base handle. The base handle for the fiberglass system is model FHTT. The base handle for the extension handle system is model XHTT. The base handle fits the corner roller, corner applicator and nail spotter without any adapters. The heavy duty, easy-to-change adapter (CFA-TT) connect the handles to the corner finishers. And the optimal diameter makes TapeTech handles the most ergonomic in the industry. Both base handles feature a D-shaped fitting that securely positions the handle in the Corner Applicator and positively prevents the tool from rotating during use. Note: If you use your current Nail Spotters with the handle system you will need to mount the handle in the back holes of the tabs on the Nail Spotter.

Description: TapeTech Corner Flushers make quick work of wiping or finishing inside corners. Direct flushers are used to apply joint compound to internal corners. Indirect flushers simply smooth compound that has been applied by another tool. TapeTech flushers work as both a direct and indirect flusher. That means you don’t have to decide which model to get, only which sizes fit your needs.

Description: Description The Bazooka Continuous Flow Corner Finisher Handles connect to standard TapeTech Corner Finishers to help you finish internal corners (angles) with remarkable speed and quality.
